title: 10 health benefits of Carica papaya (papaya)
intro: Carica papaya has health benefits such as alleviating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and boosting immunity. Its medicinal properties include antioxidants, anti-inflammatory compounds, and papain enzymes, which help soothe stomach problems, reduce swelling, and enhance nutrient absorption. For example, people with irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) may experience relief from symptoms like bloating and cramps after consuming papaya extract supplements or consuming ripe papaya fruit.
